description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND the user selects an SVOD to watch

steps.action:
WHEN the user presses the "X" button on the controller
AND the user presses the "X" button again after a few moments
steps.result:
THEN video playback pauses after the first button press
AND the scrubber displays for 10 seconds before auto-dismissing
AND video playback resumes after the second button press
AND the scrubber displays for 10 seconds before auto-dismissing
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position
